goals.title: Architecture Collapse
goals.description: Collapse orchestration layers into a single plane and simplify DCP into a thin module.
goals.success_criteria: Unified state management achieved; internal/dcp code reduced or merged into internal/executor.
goals.verification_method: Audit internal/ orchestration paths and verify single state loop.

goals.title: Fix Wizard and Intent Logic
goals.description: Restore functionality to 'openexec wizard' to ensure intent.md generation and story import work correctly.
goals.success_criteria: Wizard runs without panic, generates intent.md, and imports stories into the knowledge base.
goals.verification_method: Run 'openexec wizard' and verify output files and database state.

goals.title: Stabilize 'openexec run'
goals.description: Fix execution failures in 'openexec run' and ensure self-healing loops are reliable.
goals.success_criteria: Tasks complete successfully through the execution plane without immediate failures.
goals.verification_method: Execute 'openexec run' on a predefined test task.

stories.title: Fix CLI Wizard & Intent Planning
stories.description: As a user, I want the wizard to generate valid intent files so that I can start new projects autonomously.
acceptance_criteria: intent.md is correctly formatted according to latest specs.
Stories are successfully imported into the local database.

stories.title: Orchestration Plane Consolidation
stories.description: As a system, I want a single orchestration plane so that state management is unified and self-healing loops are stable.
acceptance_criteria: DCP logic is refactored into internal/executor or a thin helper module.
Orchestrator loop handles all state transitions without intermediate layer synchronization.
'openexec run' successfully executes a multi-task plan.

stories.title: Final Goal Validation
stories.description: As an engineer, I want to verify the entire system is stable and the architecture is lean.
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass across cli, orchestrator, and executor.
System architecture matches v1 collapse requirements.

stories.title: Codebase Study & Mapping
stories.description: As an architect, I want to map the existing orchestration and executor layers so that I can safely collapse them without regressions.
acceptance_criteria: Knowledge base updated with dependency graph of internal/orchestrator, internal/executor, and internal/dcp.
Current failure points in 'openexec run' and 'openexec wizard' are documented.
